response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: No lyrics reference was provided, as this is a newly debuted original song. Manual transcription was performed.
2. JSON Usage: The song title 'かくれんぼ' (Hide and Seek) was used to guide the transcription, particularly correcting the standard lyrics guess '待っただよ' to 'まだだよ' (meaning 'Not yet' in Japanese hide-and-seek).
3. Timing & Pacing: Timings are strictly anchored to vocal chords, using instantaneous transitions during fast-paced chorus lines. A visual-text subtitle was added at the end for the next song title card ('曇天').

subtitles.original: 邪魔な誰かの記憶は
subtitles.english: Annoying memories of someone...

subtitles.original: 夕日と共に蘇る
subtitles.english: ...are revived along with the setting sun.

subtitles.original: 古ぼけた絵本を飛び出して
subtitles.english: Jumping out of an old, worn-out picture book,

subtitles.original: 落書きの中に一つの答えを見つけた
subtitles.english: I found a single answer within the scribbles.

subtitles.original: 自分の価値に目を疑って どこまでだって落ちていけるの
subtitles.english: Doubting my own worth, wondering how far down I can fall.

subtitles.original: どこか遠くに消えてしまいたい こんな世界じゃ僕は要らない
subtitles.english: I want to disappear somewhere far away; in a world like this, I'm not needed.

subtitles.original: カウントダウンは始まっているよ
subtitles.english: The countdown has already begun!

subtitles.original: いるよ
subtitles.english: It's already started!

subtitles.original: いっせーので声を上げて
subtitles.english: Ready, set, raise your voice!

subtitles.original: 聞こえてくるんだ
subtitles.english: I can hear it coming.

subtitles.original: 自分の影の長さに気付くのも こんな時間だ
subtitles.english: It's at this time of day that I notice the length of my own shadow.

subtitles.original: 一等星が顔を出した
subtitles.english: The brightest star has shown its face,

subtitles.original: 届きそうで手を伸ばした
subtitles.english: looking close enough that I reached my hand out to it.

subtitles.original: 次は僕についてきなよと 暗闇でも
subtitles.english: Telling me "follow me next time," even in the darkness.

subtitles.original: もう一回 まだだよ
subtitles.english: One more time, "Not yet!"

subtitles.original: 幕は上がりだした
subtitles.english: The curtain has begun to rise.

subtitles.original: もう一回 まだだよ
subtitles.english: One more time, "Not yet!"

subtitles.original: 色づいていく ここから
subtitles.english: Coloring in from here on.

subtitles.original: 10年後の僕らは すれ違いばかりで
subtitles.english: Ten years from now, we keep passing each other by.

subtitles.original: 喧騒に思いを馳せては 戻れない そう思い込んだ
subtitles.english: Getting lost in the hustle and bustle, thinking we can never go back.

subtitles.original: くたびれた心に追いつく あの頃と変わらない夕日も
subtitles.english: Caught up to my worn-out heart, even the setting sun that hasn't changed since then...

subtitles.original: なんとも思わない
subtitles.english: ...doesn't make me feel anything anymore.

subtitles.original: 自分を信じ歩いていければ どこまでだって登れるのにな
subtitles.english: If only I could believe in myself and keep walking, I could climb to anywhere...

subtitles.original: 立ち止まる その空白に 大切なもの見落としている
subtitles.english: In that empty pause where I stop, I am overlooking what's important.

subtitles.original: 見つけられないと泣き喚く君へ
subtitles.english: To you, who cries out that you can't find it...

subtitles.original: いっせーので声を上げて
subtitles.english: Ready, set, raise your voice!

subtitles.original: 聞こえてくるんだ
subtitles.english: I can hear it coming.

subtitles.original: 自分の影の長さに気付くのも こんな時間だ
subtitles.english: It's at this time of day that I notice the length of my own shadow.

subtitles.original: 一等賞で駆け抜ける君
subtitles.english: You, who runs through in first place,

subtitles.original: くっついていただけの僕でも
subtitles.english: even though I was just clinging on.

subtitles.original: 君の前を歩けるかな こんな頼りない僕でも
subtitles.english: I wonder if I can walk in front of you, even though I'm so unreliable.

subtitles.original: 宝箱はホコリをかぶったまま 無くした
subtitles.english: The treasure chest remained covered in dust and got lost.

subtitles.original: 鍵はずっと 君のポケットの中にあった
subtitles.english: But the key was always inside your pocket.

subtitles.original: 散らばってたすべてが今一つに重なる
subtitles.english: Everything that was scattered is now overlapping into one.

subtitles.original: 手を取り始めよう 僕たちの物語
subtitles.english: Let's take hands and begin our story.

subtitles.original: 宝箱はホコリをかぶったまま 無くした (いらない かくした)
subtitles.english: The treasure chest remained covered in dust and got lost (Unneeded, hidden...)

subtitles.original: 鍵はずっと 君のポケットの中にあった (みつけた 手を伸ばした)
subtitles.english: But the key was always inside your pocket (...found it, reached out...)

subtitles.original: 散らばってたすべてが今愛おしくて (君と 愛おしくて)
subtitles.english: Everything that was scattered is now precious (...with you, so precious.)

subtitles.original: 今一つに重なる
subtitles.english: Now overlapping into one.

subtitles.original: かけ声はいつも
subtitles.english: The shouting cheer is always...

subtitles.original: いっせーので声を上げて保存する
subtitles.english: Ready, set, raise your voice!

subtitles.original: いっせーので声を上げて 聞こえてくるんだよ
subtitles.english: Ready, set, raise your voice! I can hear it coming.

subtitles.original: 自分の影の長さに気付くのも こんな時間だ
subtitles.english: It's at this time of day that I notice the length of my own shadow.

subtitles.original: 一等賞で駆け抜ける君
subtitles.english: You, who runs through in first place,

subtitles.original: 届きそうで手を伸ばした
subtitles.english: looking close enough that I reached my hand out to you.

subtitles.original: 次は僕についてきなよと 暗闇でも
subtitles.english: Telling me "follow me next time," even in the darkness.

subtitles.original: もう一回 まだだよ
subtitles.english: One more time, "Not yet!"

subtitles.original: 泣きたくなる声で
subtitles.english: With a voice that makes me want to cry.

subtitles.original: もう一回 まだだよ
subtitles.english: One more time, "Not yet!"

subtitles.original: 笑う君が見えた
subtitles.english: I saw you smiling.

subtitles.original: もう一回 まだだよ 幕は上がりだした
subtitles.english: One more time, "Not yet!" The curtain has begun to rise.

subtitles.original: もう一回 もういいよ
subtitles.english: One more time, "Ready or not!"

subtitles.original: 色づいていく ここから
subtitles.english: Coloring in from here on.

subtitles.original: 曇天
subtitles.english: [Song: Cloudy Weather] (Donten)
